keywords.name: ball.export.geometry.split
keywords.description: If specified, the split keyword results in each ball being exported into a dedicated geometry set

examples.command: domain extent - 5.0 5.0 ball create radius 2.0 x - 2.5 ball create radius 2.0 x 2.5 ball export geometry

domain extent - 5.0 5.0 ball create radius 2.0 x - 4.5 ball create radius 2.0 x 0.0 ball create radius 2.0 x 4.5 ball export geometry set finer resolution 0.1 range id 1 ball export geometry set default resolution 0.25 range id 2 ball export geometry set coarser resolution 0.5 range id 3
domain extent - 10.0 10.0 ball generate number 10 radius 1.0 3.0 ball export geometry split geometry export test . stl format stl
